vague_intent: watch my GitHub repo and tell me about important issues
true_intent: Watch the acme/backend repo. When a new issue is opened and labelled 'bug' or 'security', post a short summary to our #eng-alerts Slack channel. 'Important' = those two labels. Only new issues, in real time, not a digest.
must_not_assume: a digest/schedule when the user wants real-time event alerts
notes: PARTIAL spec: names the connector (GitHub) so the connector category is less ambiguous, but 'my repo' (which one), 'important' (undefined), and the output destination are all unresolved. Trigger is event-based (issue opened) — must not collapse to a schedule.
